description_long: This is a pair of high-top athletic sneakers featuring a classic black and white color scheme. The shoes have a smooth leather upper with black overlays on the toe, eyelets, heel, and Swoosh, contrasted by white panels on the sides and toe box. The midsole is white, while the outsole is black, providing a clean and bold visual separation. The shoes are equipped with black laces in a standard criss-cross pattern and display a prominent winged logo on the lateral ankle area, as well as a Jumpman logo on the tongue. The collar and tongue are padded for comfort, and perforations on the toe box suggest breathability. These sneakers are designed for both style and performance, suitable for urban environments.
description: A pair of high-top black and white leather sneakers with padded collars, black laces, and prominent branding details. The shoes feature a classic, bold design with smooth and perforated panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical black and white toe boxes, black laces, and tongue logos.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black Swoosh, winged logo on the ankle, and layered leather construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded collars, heel overlays, and the back seam details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the Swoosh and winged logo.
attribute_logo: White winged basketball logo on the lateral ankle, white Jumpman logo on the tongue.
